case_title: BRIDGEVIEW CONDOMINIUMS VS. SEIKI OKADA, MR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BRIDGEVIEW CONDOMINIUMS AS TO DEFENDANT OKADA, MR, SEIKI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
